meaning: adj.骑在背肩上的adv.在背上,在肩上
examples: My father carried me up the hill, piggyback.
They give each other piggyback rides.
At a party, Kendall jumped on a friend for a piggyback ride.
And what they're going to do is essentially take voice and piggyback the success they've had.
